description: Configure a new DICOM destination node in Weasis and send the currently loaded study to it. A local PACS receiver is already running on the network. Use the following configuration for the destination: Name: 'Local PACS', AE Title: 'LOCAL_PACS', Hostname: '127.0.0.1', and Port: '4242'. Ensure the DICOM series is successfully sent to this node.
